domain_hint: Finite element analysis of titanium hip stem implant under ISO 7206-4 quasi-static loading, Abaqus/Standard, strain gauge correlation
ambiguity_notes: (1) Mesh convergence / peak stress value — formal convergence table cites 418 MPa but locally-refined mesh reached 441 MPa; executive summary uses 418 MPa without disclosure. (2) Physical test correlation — slide 6 characterizes agreement as "good across all locations" despite the lateral surface result being outside the ±10% acceptance threshold. (3) Model pedigree / inherited validation — analyst describes HS-7 as inheriting HS-5 validated framework with "minor geometric updates," but the fillet radius change (1.2 mm → 0.5 mm) is a stress-concentration-critical modification that was not re-verified. (4) Stair-climb load case — results are labeled "validated predictions" in slide 11 despite no physical test data existing for that load case.
